repositories.name: armankhondker/best-system-design-resources
key_resources: Top Tech Engineering Blogs: OpenAI, Stripe, Instagram, Netflix

curated_patterns.name: Microservices with API Gateway
curated_patterns.description: Standard pattern for scalable backends with centralized auth and routing.

curated_patterns.name: Event-Sourcing and CQRS
curated_patterns.description: Separating read and write models with an immutable event log.

curated_patterns.name: Multi-Region Active-Active High Availability
curated_patterns.description: Deploying services across multiple geographic regions with real-time replication.

curated_patterns.name: Content Delivery Network (CDN) with Edge Side Includes
curated_patterns.description: Offloading static and dynamic content delivery to the edge for low latency.

curated_patterns.name: Distributed Locking with etcd/Zookeeper
curated_patterns.description: Ensuring mutually exclusive access to shared resources in a distributed cluster.

curated_patterns.name: Design WhatsApp (Messaging System)
curated_patterns.description: High-concurrency messaging with WebSocket, end-to-end encryption, and multi-device sync.

curated_patterns.name: Design Netflix (Video Streaming)
curated_patterns.description: Microservices architecture for video transcoding, CDN integration, and recommendation engines.

curated_patterns.name: Design Uber (Ride-Sharing)
curated_patterns.description: Geospatial indexing (S2/H3), real-time location tracking, and high-availability marketplace matching.

curated_patterns.name: Sharding & Consistency at Instagram
curated_patterns.description: Techniques for horizontally scaling relational databases while maintaining global ordering.
